cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out the answer to this question. So the question is asking why Ms. Leibfried asked the author to recite a passage in front of the class. The options are A, B, C, or D. Let me look back at the passage to find the clues. First, the passage mentions that the author was an introvert and the only nonwhite student, feeling shy and teased. Ms. Leibfried noticed her interest in reading and writing and made her feel less shy. She even suggested a favorite novel. The big project was a book report, but Ms. Leibfried suggested the author do something "a little different." The author chose a passage from "The Bell Jar" to recite.
